title: Chapter 80
content:
Chapter 80: Chapter 80: The High-Class Temptation

The heavy wooden door creaked open, spilling the bright morning sunlight into the dim entryway. Ye Rou stood frozen, her eyes wide with shock, before a massive, beaming smile broke across her face.

"Oh my heavens!" Ye Rou gasped, bringing her dirt-smudged hands to her cheeks. "Su Mei?!"

Standing on the threshold was a woman who looked like she belonged in the inner courts of the Emperor’s palace, not the dusty streets of the outer sect.

Madam Su Mei was the absolute definition of high-class, married wealth. She was wrapped in a breathtaking, skin-tight qipao made of the finest crimson silk. The dress was a masterclass in seduction-it clung to every single curve of her incredibly lush, MILF figure with ruthless precision. The silk strained desperately over her massive, heavy breasts, the twin peaks jutting out aggressively, while the deep plunge of the neckline revealed a canyon of pale, perfumed cleavage.

But it wasn’t just her chest. As she stepped over the threshold, her hips rolled with a slow, hypnotic sway. Her ass was incredibly big, soft, and jiggly, bouncing against the tight silk with every step she took. The high slits on the sides of her dress flashed glimpses of thick, creamy thighs wrapped in expensive silk stockings.

"Ye Rou, darling," Su Mei purred.

Her voice was thick, sultry, and dripping with an intoxicating mix of arrogance and raw sexuality. It was the kind of voice that commanded men to drop to their knees and empty their wallets.

"It has been far too long," Su Mei smiled, her red-painted lips curling sensually. She stepped into the house, bringing with her a heavy, intoxicating cloud of expensive rose and musk perfume.

"Come in, come in! Please sit!" Ye Rou practically vibrated with excitement, completely forgetting her previous worries. She ushered her rich friend inside. "I am so surprised! It’s been so many days since we last met!"

Su Mei glided into the living room, her jiggly ass mesmerizing Kai as she walked past him. Then, she stopped. She slowly turned her head, her sharp, heavily lined eyes locking onto Kai’s tall, muscular frame.

She looked him up and down, her gaze lingering on his broad shoulders, his strong chest, and the undeniable bulge resting comfortably in his Academy trousers. She licked her glossy red lips.

"My, my..." Su Mei murmured, taking a slow, deliberate step toward him. "Is this Kai? Your son, right?"

"Yes!" Ye Rou beamed, standing beside them, her own massive breasts heaving with joy under her yellow dress.

Su Mei stepped entirely into Kai’s personal space. The top of her head barely reached his chin, forcing her to look up at him through her thick eyelashes.

"Oh my, you are so grown up, Kai," she breathed, her sultry voice dropping an octave. She reached out, her manicured fingers adorned with jade rings brushing lightly against his bicep. She gave the hard muscle a subtle, testing squeeze. "It’s been so much time since I saw you... you were just a scrawny little boy. Now look at you. A real man."

Kai looked down at her. He stared directly into her deep, exposed cleavage, feeling the heat radiating from her body.

Damn,

Kai thought to himself, keeping his face perfectly neutral.

I don’t know a single thing about this woman because it’s not my original body. But if the old Kai had this absolute goddess of a MILF around and didn’t notice, he was an idiot.

Kai offered his most charming, roguish smile.

"Ahh... yes, Aunty," Kai said smoothly, leaning in just a fraction so his deep voice vibrated near her ear. "It’s really been so much time. I also missed you."

Su Mei’s eyes widened slightly in surprise at his bold tone. A wicked, playful spark ignited in her gaze.

She leaned forward, deliberately pressing the soft, heavy swell of her massive crimson-wrapped breasts against his chest.

"Missed me?" Su Mei whispered, her hot breath fanning across his jawline. "Oh, really? And what exactly did you miss about your Aunty Su Mei, hm?"

Before Kai could give her the filthy answer she was begging for, Ye Rou clapped her hands together happily.

"Wait right here!" Ye Rou announced, completely oblivious to the intense sexual tension thick enough to cut with a knife. "I will prepare something special for you! I am so happy to see my dearest friend. I’ll make the good tea!"

Ye Rou quickly turned and hurried toward the kitchen, her own heavy hips and massive, jiggling ass bouncing under the faded yellow linen, leaving the two of them alone for a fleeting moment.

Su Mei watched Ye Rou leave, then slowly dragged her eyes back up to Kai’s face.

"I am also so happy to see you, Ye Rou!" Su Mei called out sweetly to the kitchen, never breaking eye contact with Kai. She stepped back, running a hand down the curve of her own waist to rest on her wide hip. "You know I am always so busy. My husband keeps me locked up in that grand estate, and I rarely get time to go out of my house."

She bit her lip, looking at Kai like a lioness looking at a fresh piece of meat.

"But today... I thought I should visit you. And also see your son... to see exactly how much he has...

grown up

."

Her eyes deliberately flicked down to his crotch before snapping back to his eyes.

"Ahh... yes, he surely has!" Ye Rou called back from the kitchen, her voice full of innocent, motherly pride. "And also, he became so much more responsible recently! He is taking care of me now!"

Su Mei smirked, tapping a manicured finger against her chin. "Responsible, hm? I love a responsible young man."

A few minutes later, Ye Rou returned with a tray of fragrant tea and delicate pastries.

"Come, let’s sit for food," Ye Rou directed.

They all gathered around the small wooden table. If it was cramped with just Kai and Ye Rou, it was a downright hazard now. The table was completely dominated by the sheer volume of the two women’s chests. On one side, Ye Rou’s massive, natural, motherly breasts rested heavily on the wood in her faded dress. On the other side, Su Mei’s aggressive, perfectly supported crimson globes pushed forward, daring Kai to stare.

Su Mei gracefully crossed her legs under the table. As she did, the slit of her qipao fell away, exposing her thick, creamy thigh wrapped in sheer silk directly to Kai’s line of sight.

She picked up her teacup, holding it with delicate elegance.

"So, Ye Rou," Su Mei began, taking a slow sip, her eyes drifting over the rim of the cup to lock onto Kai again. "Tell me everything. I want to know exactly what this handsome son of yours has been up to..."
